evals.prompt: openclaw 最新版本是多少？最近有什么新功能，帮我查一下。
evals.expected_output: intent info_query, route [info], needs_latest true, needs_writing false.

evals.prompt: 查一下我们之前存过的飞书自动化改造记录，我要看历史决策。
基于我们库里的资料，再补一点最新公开信息，写一篇 800 字说明。
evals.expected_output: intent write_request or mixed_request, route [knowledge, info, writer], needs_latest true, needs_history true, needs_writing true.
intent article_ingest, route [knowledge], high confidence, hard-rule style classification.

evals.prompt: 现在虾群健康状态怎么样，帮我巡检一下。

evals.expected_output: intent uncertain with smallest safe starter route and low confidence.
